drawer.description: Video walkthroughs of the product, module by module. Pick an item in the list or use Previous and Next to move through the flows.
drawer.videoFallback: Your browser cannot play embedded video.

bio.title: Full-Stack Developer · Laravel, Vue, Nuxt & Tailwind
bio.tagline: End-to-end web products with Laravel, Vue and Nuxt — solid UX, performance, clean architecture, and teamwork.
bio.heroTrustLine: Freelance · Bello, Antioquia · Colombia · Vue, Nuxt, Laravel, WordPress (Divi, Elementor), SaaS/ERP, and deployments

portfolio.aboutLead: I’m a full-stack developer: Laravel on the backend (APIs, Eloquent, queues when needed) and Vue, Nuxt (including Nuxt UI), PrimeVue, and Tailwind on the frontend. I also build and maintain WordPress sites with Divi and Elementor when a CMS fits the product.
portfolio.aboutMore: I care about clear Laravel architecture and clean front-end integrations. I work from Colombia with remote teams and clients: from Laravel sites and APIs to B2B product (SaaS, ERP, user management, domain purchase, and deployment flows). I use Git, agile practices, and I keep improving my English. I like turning requirements into interfaces people can use without friction.

ticador-platform.title: Ticador — production SaaS ecosystem
ticador-platform.description: I built a production SaaS ecosystem for ticador.online, composed of four decoupled repos that talk to each other: a marketing site, a multi-tenant provisioning platform, the core workforce attendance system, and a Mail Center as a dedicated Laravel service to receive, distribute messages, and log delivery. It automates the full onboarding and day-to-day cycle for each customer: environments, guided setup, employees, authorized devices, time clocking, reporting, and real-time notifications. Private repos; representative video and screenshots in this portfolio.

main-navigation.title: Main navigation
main-navigation.description: Overview of the Ticador Automatization admin panel, where system operations, site management, subscription access, and key customer provisioning flows are centralized.

tenant-provisioning-flow.title: Tenant provisioning flow
tenant-provisioning-flow.description: End-to-end provisioning from the admin panel: site creation, name validation, deployment kickoff, customer environment setup, administrator assignment, and access to the deployed project on its subdomain.

subscriptions-coupons-cycle.title: Subscriptions and coupons lifecycle
subscriptions-coupons-cycle.description: Walkthrough of subscription management in the admin panel: active plans, the creation modal, expiration dates, each subscription’s lifecycle, and promotional coupon administration.

onboarding-wizard.title: Onboarding wizard
onboarding-wizard.description: Guided first-run setup to speed up each customer go-live: company, employees, devices, and reporting in a structured flow.

application-main-navigation.title: Main application panel navigation
application-main-navigation.description: Walkthrough of the operational attendance app shell: employees, devices, clock-in/out, incidents, reporting, and workplace settings — the product admins and staff use every day on the customer site.

device-access.title: Device access
device-access.description: Access control based on authorized devices. The system flags unregistered hardware, surfaces its status, and lets admins validate it before it’s allowed in the clock-in flow.

employee-check-in-out.title: Employee check-in / check-out
employee-check-in-out.description: Core time-tracking flow where employees clock in and out with an assigned token, keeping a clear record of their workday.

incident-report.title: Incident report
incident-report.description: Incident management to log issues, follow cases, and keep employee–admin communication inside the same platform.

cosmos-erp.title: Cosmos ERP — multi-tenant ERP platform in development
cosmos-erp.description: Multi-tenant ERP focused on commercial operations and invoicing, with flows for initial setup, customer management, invoice issuance, document conversion with traceability, and POS operations. The product also includes tax-relevant auxiliary records, module-level statistics, kiosk mode, and an administrative layer for backups, manual tenant provisioning, and administrator management. It remains in active development but has already been tested by selected real-world customers. Before general distribution: Verifactu integration for electronic compliance, a notifications module, and additional operational settings.

initial-setup.title: Initial setup
initial-setup.description: First-run ERP setup from the initial access: email validation through an OTP code, administrator personal data entry, company information setup, and fiscal data configuration. The flow ends with a summary screen that leaves the environment ready for daily operation.

erp-overview.title: Main ERP navigation
erp-overview.description: General walkthrough of the system navigation, showing several dashboard modules, tax-relevant auxiliary records, reporting sections, settings, and help as a quick overview of the product’s functional scope.

customer-creation.title: Customer creation
customer-creation.description: Customer creation flow inside the ERP, including general information, banking details with bank auto-fill based on the IBAN, and a walkthrough of the contact and billing tabs within the same modal to prepare the record for commercial operations.

sales-invoice-creation.title: Sales invoice creation
sales-invoice-creation.description: Sales invoice issuance from the ERP, going through the main document tabs while focusing the flow on customer selection, line items, quantities, and the final invoice creation.

document-conversion.title: Document conversion and traceability
document-conversion.description: Commercial document conversion flow, including source, target, fiscal year, customer, document selection, and conversion options. The demo also shows the converted document being opened and the full traceability available through that document’s conversion history.

pos-configuration-billing.title: POS setup and operational billing
pos-configuration-billing.description: Walkthrough of the initial POS setup, including invoice series selection, cash register setup, tables, and work sections, followed by the full product billing flow. The demo also shows strict stock validation and invalidation when inventory conditions are not met.

wordpress-elementor-agenda.title: Dental clinic site with a custom booking plugin
wordpress-elementor-agenda.description: WordPress site for a dental clinic with a bespoke scheduling flow: service selection, date and time, patient details, Bold Payments integration, booking summary, and automated email notifications for both the patient and the practice.

main-navigation.title: Main site navigation
main-navigation.description: Walkthrough of the live site: home, services, contact, and a quick look at the booking area — context for the product and the public-facing patient experience.

booking-flow.title: Booking flow
booking-flow.description: Online booking flow with Bold Payments integration. The patient selects the service, date, and time, enters their details, confirms the reservation, and chooses full payment or deposit. The demo goes as far as opening the Bold modal because the project is already in production; once the transaction is confirmed, the system registers the appointment, takes the user to a summary view with reservation and payment status, and sends email notifications to both the clinic and the patient.

freelance-advanced.title: Freelance — advanced projects and B2B product
freelance-advanced.description: Since 2024 I’ve taken on more product and infrastructure-heavy work. With an agency in Colombia: Laravel, APIs, and WordPress, expanding from Elementor into Divi. Remotely, B2B product — SaaS, multi-tenant ERP (Laravel + Nuxt), user-management platforms, domain purchase, and hosting-linked deployment. Docker Compose across environments and GitHub Actions: backend/frontend tests (Pest, Vitest, guardrails) and automated deploys to servers and common panels (Plesk, cPanel, and similar). Remote, production-minded delivery.

university-eafit.title: University studies
university-eafit.description: Degree completed. Integrator projects, software-engineering foundations, and quality habits I apply in client work.

freelance-early.title: Freelance — early projects
freelance-early.description: Scoped client work: promotional landings and pages with WordPress and Elementor, focused on clear layout and fast turnaround.

cesde-tech.title: Technical training in web development
cesde-tech.description: Web-focused program: programming fundamentals, development basics, and databases as a bridge into real projects.
